exam_format: Proctored multiple-choice exam (some certifications include scenario-based items)

testing_centers.notes: CertNexus exams (including CAIP AIP-210 and CET-110) are delivered through Pearson VUE test centers and online proctoring where available. ANSI/ANAB accredited under ISO/IEC 17024.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required for proctored exams. Registration via CertNexus or Pearson VUE account.
exam_rules: Closed book. No external resources or notes unless explicitly permitted. Follow Pearson VUE and CertNexus candidate rules.
renewal_options: Recertification every 3 years via continuing education, re-examination, or approved activities. CertNexus regularly updates content for new AI regulations and techniques.

retake_policy.notes: Standard CertNexus retake policy; check current candidate handbook.

domains.name: Ethical and Legal Frameworks for Emerging Tech
Identifying and Mitigating Bias and Risk
